About BENIM

BENIM.
BENIM Group Co. Ltd

Who We Are

BENIM is a modern Nigerian trading and fashion brand built on quality, trust, and value. We curate footwear and fashion essentials designed to match everyday style with a premium feel — without the premium price.

Our Mission

Our mission is to bridge the gap between affordability and style, delivering products that feel global but remain accessible to every Nigerian household.

Our Promise

At BENIM, we are not just selling products — we are building a trusted lifestyle brand. Every item we carry is carefully selected to meet our standards for quality, durability, and style.

Why Choose BENIM?

  • 100% authentic, quality-checked products
  • Honest, affordable pricing — no hidden costs
  • Fast, reliable delivery across Nigeria
  • Friendly customer support via WhatsApp
  • Easy returns within 3–7 days
  • Secure checkout with Firebase authentication
Chat With Us

Return Policy

3–7 Day Returns

We accept returns within 3–7 days of delivery on eligible items.

Return Window

You may return eligible items within 3–7 days of confirmed delivery. Returns requested after this window will not be accepted.

Conditions for Return

  • Item must be unused, unworn, and in original packaging
  • Tags and labels must still be attached
  • Receipt or proof of purchase (Order ID) is required
  • Items damaged due to customer misuse are not eligible
  • Sale / flash sale items are final sale and not returnable

How to Return

  • WhatsApp us at +234 916 803 1213 within 3–7 days of delivery
  • Send your Order ID and clear photos of the item
  • Our team will review and send pickup or drop-off instructions
  • Do not ship items back without prior approval

Refunds

Approved refunds are processed within 3–5 business days via the original payment method or bank transfer.

Non-Returnable Items

  • Underwear, socks, and personal care items
  • Items marked "Final Sale" or bought during flash sales
  • Customised or personalised products
  • Items without original tags or packaging
Need help?
Contact our support team:
WhatsApp: +234 916 803 1213

Delivery Policy

Fast & Reliable Delivery

We deliver across Nigeria within 1–5 business days.

Delivery Areas

  • Lagos – 1–2 business days
  • Abuja & Port Harcourt – 2–3 business days
  • Other major cities – 3–5 business days
  • Remote areas – 5–7 business days

Delivery Fees

  • Ibadan: ₦1,500 – ₦2,500
  • Lagos: ₦2,500 – ₦3,500
  • Abuja / Port Harcourt: ₦4,500 – ₦6,000
  • Other states: ₦3,000 – ₦6,000
  • Free delivery on orders above ₦150,000

How It Works

  • Place your order and complete payment
  • You receive an order confirmation on WhatsApp
  • Your item is packed and dispatched within 24 hours
  • You receive tracking updates via WhatsApp
  • Delivery agent contacts you before arrival

Important Notes

  • Ensure your delivery address and phone number are correct at checkout
  • Someone must be available to receive the package
  • BENIM is not responsible for delays caused by incorrect addresses
  • Delivery times may vary during public holidays
Delivery issues?
Contact us immediately:
WhatsApp: +234 916 803 1213
